## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Abnormal Security and GrowthX to align on content strategy and next steps for SEO optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX identified declining impressions/clicks, primarily from Abnormal's glossary content](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Technical SEO issues found: 404 sitemap, poor web vitals performance](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Content clusters proposed: email security, threat intelligence, AI security (to be added)](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to deliver 2 calibration articles next week, aiming for 10 articles/week ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1989.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Declining impressions and clicks, mainly from glossary content](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)
  - [Blog performance healthier but spiky, likely due to threat-related interest](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Glossary has 2X more impressions than blog, presenting optimization opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=478.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Sitemap 404ing in Google Search Console, not updated since 2022](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Poor web vitals performance, especially on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=646.0)
  - [Action: Abnormal team to address sitemap issue and investigate web performance](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [GrowthX proposed content clusters based on competitor keyword gaps](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Key clusters: email security, threat intelligence, security awareness](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=330.0)
  - [Abnormal team suggested adding AI security as a priority cluster](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Caution needed on threat intelligence angle due to Abnormal's AI-focused approach](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

### Content Production Plan

  - [Start with 2 calibration articles next week](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=291.0)
  - [Ramp up to 5 new + 5 refresh articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1004.0)
  - [Long-term goal: 2,400 programmatic pages per year](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Consider balancing with Abnormal's existing content calendar (4 posts/week)](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1293.0)

### Abnormal Intelligence Subdomain

  - [Currently low traffic (200 visitors/week) despite quality content](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Potential cannibalization issues with main domain](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)
  - [Action: Investigate canonicalization and promotion strategies](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1570.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to refine content clusters based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Abnormal team to review and prioritize topics in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [GrowthX to deliver 2 calibration articles early next week](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to discuss image/design requirements for new content](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide insights on site speed issues for dev team](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=2434.0)
  - [Aim for rapid scaling of content production after initial calibration](https://fathom.video/share/S9wzDkMx2Csot8cMyLNqBhiN_dN8zn2S?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
